ops.title: superset-main-workspace-delete-refused
ops.body: superset v1.15.0 categorically refuses `workspaces delete <id>` on a project's main workspace — error contains "Main workspaces cannot be deleted". No `projects delete` CLI exists; removal is GUI-only. `backend.superset.KillWorkstream` treats this specific error as a soft success (returns nil) since every terminal was already SIGHUP-killed by the delete attempt itself before the CLI rejected the workspace record deletion; every other error still propagates wrapped.
